direct-vision-reliance.description: CRITICAL: Strictly prohibits the use of hallucinated tools and enforces direct visual analysis.

multi-part-instruction-evaluation.description: Guidelines for evaluating prompts with multiple distinct requirements, ensuring all parts are fulfilled.

text-rendering-evaluation.description: Rubric for evaluating the addition or modification of text in images, emphasizing exact spelling and typography.

exclusivity-and-preservation.description: Evaluating whether the edit is exclusive to the requested changes, specifically checking for global bleed.

artistic-style-transfer-evaluation.description: Guidelines for evaluating prompts that request a change in artistic style (e.g., specific artists, mediums).

background-and-scene-transformation.description: Guidelines for evaluating prompts that change the background or setting of an image.

object-extraction-evaluation.description: Guidelines for evaluating prompts that request extracting a subject and removing the background, emphasizing subject preservation.

artist-and-style-knowledge.description: Guidelines for evaluating edits that reference specific artists, art movements, or cultural references.

spatial-and-relational-edits.description: Guidelines for evaluating edits involving spatial relationships, positioning, and directional changes.

scene-and-atmosphere-transformation.description: Guidelines for evaluating edits that change the atmosphere, setting, or context of a scene.

counting-and-spatial-reasoning.description: Guidelines for evaluating edits involving counting objects, specific spatial placements, or rotations.

multi-attribute-verification.description: Guidelines for verifying objects that require multiple specific attributes or details.
